author: zhenbinwu
body:
#### PR description:

* Extend the Kalman Muon Barrel Track Finding algorithm for more precise measurements of track eta and z
* Making use of new dataformat of Phase2 DT, Phi-Theta matched pairs 
* Detail in [talk](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1673367/contributions/7034276/subcontributions/609748/attachments/3253309/5806554/L1MuonTrigger_04-09-26_campos%20(2).pdf)

#### PR validation:

Ongoing ...
title: [Phase2 L1T] GMT Upgrade of Kalman Filter for Barrel Muon KMTF
